title: scap-security-guide bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[0.1.79-2.0.1]
- Update OL9 STIG to V1R3 [Orabug: 38790495]
- Add new rule to ensure EPEL is not configured [Orabug: 38790495]
- Update OL8 and OL9 STIG references [Orabug: 38790495]

[0.1.79-2]
- Rebuild (RHEL-130242)

[0.1.79-1]
- rebase scap-security-guide to the latest version 0.1.79 (RHEL-130242)
- add a test scenario to cover case where user has nologin defined in usr (RHEL-118647)
full_text:
[0.1.79-2.0.1]
- Update OL9 STIG to V1R3 [Orabug: 38790495]
- Add new rule to ensure EPEL is not configured [Orabug: 38790495]
- Update OL8 and OL9 STIG references [Orabug: 38790495]

[0.1.79-2]
- Rebuild (RHEL-130242)

[0.1.79-1]
- rebase scap-security-guide to the latest version 0.1.79 (RHEL-130242)
- add a test scenario to cover case where user has nologin defined in usr (RHEL-118647)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23191.html
